proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing $500,000 each year on manual proposal creation. Here's how it vanishes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Current proposal creation takes hours away from innovation. Automated generation in 47 seconds changes everything.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not minor inconveniences, Gmail is bleeding resources.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Each proposal takes 3 hours to create. That's 3 hours not spent improving Gmail's features or user experience.

problems.title: Wasted Talent
problems.description: Top employees spend 40% of their time on proposals, costing Gmail $200,000 in lost productivity annually.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals lead to lost deals. Each delay costs Gmail $50,000 in potential revenue.

problems.title: Inconsistency Risk
problems.description: Every inconsistent proposal weakens Gmail's brand image, costing $30,000 in brand equity annually.

problems.title: Error-Prone
problems.description: Manual errors in proposals lead to $20,000 in lost deals and corrections every year.

problems.title: Resource Strain
problems.description: Proposal tasks consume resources that could enhance Gmail's 15 GB storage offering. This costs $200,000 in missed development.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these losses with streamlined efficiency.

solutions.title: Speedy Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are manually crafted, taking hours. Our system crafts them in 47 seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Inconsistent branding weakens Gmail's image. Our system ensures every proposal is on-brand, reinforcing Gmail's reputation.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual errors are costly. Our AI eliminates these, saving Gmail tens of thousands annually.

solutions.title: Enhanced Productivity
solutions.description: Top talent is wasted on proposals. Our system reclaims their time for innovation, boosting Gmail's development capacity.

solutions.title: Opportunity Capture
solutions.description: Missed deals due to delays are costly. Our swift system ensures every opportunity is seized, maximizing revenue.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Customer Engagement with Gmail's Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will implement tailored email strategies to enhance your customer interactions and drive conversions.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is facing significant losses in customer engagement and retention.

problems.title: Low Email Engagement
problems.description: Every email that goes unopened is a missed opportunity. If just 20% of your emails are ignored, that equals hundreds of potential customers who may never engage with your brand.

problems.title: High Unsubscribe Rates
problems.description: Each unsubscribe represents a lost connection. If 5% of your subscribers opt out monthly, you are losing a valuable audience that could contribute to your growth.

problems.title: Inefficient Communication
problems.description: Slow response times can lead to customer frustration. A delay of just 24 hours in responding to inquiries can result in a 30% drop in customer satisfaction, driving revenue away.

problems.title: Underutilized Data Insights
problems.description: Not analyzing customer behavior means missing out on tailored opportunities. If you are not using data effectively, you are potentially losing 15% of revenue from customers who prefer personalized experiences.

problems.title: Limited Mobile Accessibility
problems.description: With over 50% of emails opened on mobile, not optimizing for mobile means losing potential customers. If your emails are not mobile-friendly, you risk losing 40% of your audience.

problems.title: Spam Folder Issues
problems.description: Emails landing in spam can lead to a significant drop in reach. If 10% of your emails end up in spam, that's thousands of potential customers not seeing your messages.

proposal2.solutionIntro: We have tailored solutions that directly address these losses to enhance your engagement and retention.

solutions.title: Gmail Marketing Integration
solutions.description: We will help you create compelling email campaigns that capture attention and drive engagement. With optimized templates and targeting, we can significantly increase your open and response rates.

solutions.title: Data Analytics Tools
solutions.description: Utilizing Gmail's analytics, we will track customer behavior and preferences. This will allow us to tailor messages effectively, improving customer retention and maximizing revenue.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: We will ensure all email communications are mobile-friendly, providing a seamless experience for users. This will help capture the attention of the growing mobile audience, increasing conversions.

solutions.title: Spam Prevention Strategies
solutions.description: Implementing best practices for email deliverability will ensure your messages are seen. We will reduce the risk of emails landing in spam, ensuring your audience receives your communications.

metrics.label: Projected increase in email open rates.
Projected revenue increase from improved engagement.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We leverage the latest tools and technologies to ensure your email campaigns are effective and cutting-edge.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Decisions
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are based on thorough analysis, ensuring we maximize your results.

process.description: We will analyze your current email strategies and identify key opportunities.
bullets: Conduct a comprehensive audit of your email performance.
Gather insights from your current customer base.

bullets: Create audience segments for targeted messaging.

bullets: Analyze real-time data for quick adjustments.

process.title: Optimization

bullets: Adjust messaging and targeting as necessary.
Provide a comprehensive report on campaign outcomes.
